payload.title: Project-level strict config — [package.metadata.trust] strict = true
payload.description: The tsconfig.json move: make strictness a project setting instead of a per-file marker. cargo trust reads `[package.metadata.trust] strict = true` from Cargo.toml and injects the strict marker during lowering, so no file needs #![strict] OR trust_attrs::strict!{}. Strictness becomes 'I built this with Trust', which is the correct mental model. Depends on RT subcmd story (cargo trust is the thing that reads the config). Acceptance: a crate with strict=true and zero in-file markers is fully lint-enforced under `cargo trust build`.
